headline: ISRG Stock: The Math Hidden In Its Price
summary: At $353, Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is being priced to deliver 14.1% revenue growth annually for the next 4 years simply to defend today's 42.1x multiple. That sits below the 21% the business is currently growing at, which is the unusual part. The multiple has already priced in a slowdown that has not yet appeared.
